zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Vieuxpont於大約1164年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德時，他的父親William De Vieuxpont II36歲，母親Maud de Morville36歲。他於1194年與Idonea de Builly在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1220年被列為sheriff of devon。他去世於1228年2月1日之前在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Vieuxpont于大约1164年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德时，他的父亲William De Vieuxpont II36岁，母亲Maud de Morville36岁。他于1194年与Idonea de Builly在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1220年被列为sheriff of devon。他去世于1228年2月1日之前在英国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Vieuxpont was born about 1164, in Westmorland, England, his father, William De Vieuxpont II, was 36 and his mother, Maud de Morville, was 36. He married Idonea de Builly in 1194, in Appleby, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. In 1220, at the age of 57, his occupation is listed as sheriff of devon. He died before 1 February 1228, in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Vieuxpont est né environ 1164, à Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, William De Vieuxpont II, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Maud de Morville, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Idonea de Builly en 1194, à Appleby, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. En 1220, à l’âge de 57 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of devon. Il est décédé avant 1 février 1228, à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Vieuxpont um 1164 in Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William De Vieuxpont II 36 und seine Mutter Maud de Morville 36. Er hat 1194 in Appleby, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom Idonea de Builly geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1220, als er 57 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of devon aufgeführt. Er starb vor 1. Februar 1228 in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Vieuxpont è nato il circa 1164 nel Westmorland, England, il suo padre, William De Vieuxpont II, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Morville, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Idonea de Builly nel 1194, nel Appleby, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1220, all'età di 57 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of devon. Morì prima del 1 febbraio 1228, nel England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Vieuxpontが約1164年にイギリスウエストモーランドで生まれた時，父William De Vieuxpont IIは36歳，母Maud de Morvilleは36歳であった。1194年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドアップレビーでIdonea de Buillyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1220年，57歳の時，職業はsheriff of devonと記録されている。彼は1228年2月1日以前にイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Vieuxpont(이)가 대략 1164년 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Vieuxpont II(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Morville(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1194년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 애플레비에서 Idonea de Builly(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1220년, 57세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of devon이었다. 그는 1228년 2월 1일 이전 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Vieuxpont nasceu aproximadamente 1164, em Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, William De Vieuxpont II, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Morville, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Idonea de Builly em 1194, em Appleby, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1220, com 57 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of devon. Ele faleceu antes 1 de fevereiro de 1228, em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Vieuxpont родился около 1164 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия, его отцу по имени William De Vieuxpont II было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Morville, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Idonea de Builly в 1194 г. в местности эпплеби, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. В 1220 году, в возрасте 57 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of devon. Он умер перед 1 февраль 1228 г. в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Vieuxpont nació aproximadamente 1164, en Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, William De Vieuxpont II, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Maud de Morville, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Idonea de Builly en 1194, en Appleby, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1220, a la edad de 57 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of devon. Murió antes de 1 de febrero de 1228, en Inglaterra.
